headline: Super vs ChatGPT — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: ChatGPT is a world‑class general AI assistant that’s steadily evolving toward agents and automation. Super is built for a different job: durable personal AI agents that actually operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache, so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page compares what ChatGPT is best at today, what the broader agent market is doing, and why Super is the sharper choice for ongoing computer-use work.
